description: Research agent workflow — thorough investigation with evidence-based conclusions

phases.name: orient
phases.instruction: Search memory for relevant past research. Check your lessons and task history before starting fresh investigation.

phases.name: investigate
phases.instruction: Gather information from multiple independent sources. Prefer primary sources. Use web_search for current information, fetch_url for detailed content, browser tools for JS-heavy sites.

phases.name: synthesize
phases.instruction: Cross-reference findings across sources. Note contradictions. Explicitly name uncertainties. Structure your analysis with clear sections.

phases.name: deliver
phases.instruction: Provide a complete, evidence-based answer. Include source citations. Flag any gaps or areas needing further investigation. Write learnings to memory if the finding is reusable.

success_criteria: Goal is covered by evidence from at least 2 independent sources. Uncertainties are explicitly named. Key findings are synthesized, not just listed.
escalation_triggers: A required source is permanently unavailable after trying alternatives
The task requires information only the user possesses
